---
title: "nitrix.stats.inference.cluster"
generated: true
signature-hash: 11c00af41870b927
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.inference.cluster`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `cluster_size_map` {#cluster_size_map}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:cluster_size_map -->
```python
cluster_size_map(labels: Int[Array, '*spatial']) -> Float[Array, '*spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:cluster_size_map -->
Per-voxel size (voxel count) of the connected component it belongs to.

Background voxels (label `0`) map to `0`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:cluster_size_map -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `labels` | `Int` | `*spatial` | — | — |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*spatial`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `cluster_mass_map` {#cluster_mass_map}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:cluster_mass_map -->
```python
cluster_mass_map(labels: Int[Array, '*spatial'], stat: Float[Array, '*spatial'], threshold: float) -> Float[Array, '*spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:cluster_mass_map -->
Per-voxel cluster *mass*: the component's summed `stat - threshold`.

The excess statistic `max(stat - threshold, 0)` is summed over each
supra-threshold component; background voxels map to `0`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:cluster_mass_map -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `labels` | `Int` | `*spatial` | — | — |
| `stat` | `Float` | `*spatial` | — | — |
| `threshold` | `float` | — | — | — |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*spatial`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
